_note: Edit this file quarterly (or whenever catalysts shift) to refresh the analyst/bull/bear theses shown in the Telegram portfolio reports. Each ticker needs three short fields: analyst, bull, bear. Keep each under ~280 characters. Tickers without an entry here will be skipped in the thesis section.

ADBE.analyst: Consensus Buy; price targets $480-560. Street bullish on Firefly + Acrobat AI Assistant monetization ramp into FY26; Figma rejection removed overhang.
ADBE.bull: Generative AI credits and Acrobat AI Assistant lifting ARPU; Experience Cloud cross-sell with Workfront/Marketo sustains double-digit Digital Experience growth.
ADBE.bear: Canva, Figma, and open-source diffusion models erode pricing power in Creative Cloud; enterprise deal scrutiny extends sales cycles.

AMZN.analyst: Overweight consensus; MS, GS target $260+. Focus on AWS growth acceleration, retail margin expansion, and ads run-rate.
AMZN.bull: AWS re-accelerating on AI workloads + Bedrock; ads crossing $60B run-rate at high margins; retail cost-to-serve improvements lift operating income.
AMZN.bear: $200B+ capex plan weighs on FCF; tariff drag and consumer softness threaten retail; AWS AI revenue lagging Azure/Google Cloud growth.

AVGO.analyst: Buy consensus; PTs clustered $240-280. Bulls cite AI XPU design wins; VMware accretion ahead of plan.
AVGO.bull: Custom AI accelerator deals with three hyperscalers scale into 2026; VMware subscription migration drives software-segment margin to >70%.
AVGO.bear: Non-AI semi cyclicality still soft; customer concentration in AI XPU (Google, Meta) creates binary risk if a customer insources.

BLSH.analyst: TODO — update with latest analyst view.

BTGO.analyst: TODO — update with latest analyst view.

COIN.analyst: Mixed: Bernstein bullish (stablecoin rails); others neutral on crypto-beta. Base chain and USDC revenue share drive upside scenarios.
COIN.bull: Stablecoin interest income + Base L2 adoption diversify away from trading fees; institutional custody + prime services gain share post-ETF.
COIN.bear: Earnings remain highly correlated to BTC/ETH volumes; crypto market drawdown or spot-fee compression from CEX competition pressures EPS.

CRWD.analyst: Buy consensus; PTs $400-560. Falcon Flex adoption and module attach are the key KPIs.
CRWD.bull: Falcon Flex drives larger, multi-module deals; Identity + Cloud Security + Next-Gen SIEM take share from Splunk/Okta; July 2024 outage churn smaller than feared.
CRWD.bear: Retention headwinds from the 2024 outage extend into renewals; SentinelOne/Microsoft Defender pricing pressure compresses new-logo ACV.

CRWV.analyst: Newer coverage; bulls see hyperscaler-lite AI infra play; bears flag customer concentration + debt.
CRWV.bull: Long-dated GPU capacity contracts with Microsoft/OpenAI lock in revenue; Nvidia partnership gives priority access to Blackwell/Rubin allocations.
CRWV.bear: Revenue concentration in a handful of AI labs; heavy debt load financing GPU buildouts becomes a risk if AI capex slows.

GOOG.analyst: Buy consensus; PTs $200-240. Street watching Cloud margins, Gemini monetization, and antitrust remedies.
GOOG.bull: Gemini + AI Overviews monetize Search without cannibalizing CPCs; Cloud growth reaccelerating ~35% with margin expansion; YouTube ads + subs compound.
GOOG.bear: DOJ remedies could unwind default-search distribution; $175-185B 2026 capex pressures FCF; OpenAI/Perplexity chip away at query share.

MSFT.analyst: Buy consensus; PTs $500-600. Copilot attach and Azure AI revenue share are key debates.
MSFT.bull: Azure AI revenue scaling; M365 Copilot seat attach expands; Activision/gaming adds optionality; durable enterprise moat across productivity + infra.
MSFT.bear: Capex doubling to build AI capacity compresses near-term FCF; OpenAI relationship economics and Copilot ROI under scrutiny from CIOs.

NFLX.analyst: Buy consensus; PTs $800-1100. Ad tier ramp and live events are the upside levers.
NFLX.bull: Ad tier CPM improving as audience scales; live sports/events + password-sharing crackdown sustain subscriber growth; price hikes stick.
NFLX.bear: Content cost inflation from live rights compresses margin; competition for attention from short-form video caps engagement.

NOW.analyst: Buy consensus; PTs $1000-1200. Now Assist AI-agent ACV contribution is the 2026 watch item.
NOW.bull: Now Assist AI agents land at premium pricing; platform consolidation story wins vs. point tools; federal + strategic accounts expand TCV.
NOW.bear: AI agent ROI skepticism slows uplift; macro-driven IT budget scrutiny delays Pro+/Enterprise+ upgrades.

NVDA.analyst: Buy consensus; PTs $180-220. Blackwell ramp pace and H20 export fate are the pivots.
NVDA.bull: Blackwell and GB200 drive data center revenue +50%+ YoY; sovereign AI + enterprise AI add new TAM; software (CUDA, NIM) grows high-margin mix.
NVDA.bear: Further China export restrictions on H20/successors; customer insourcing (Google TPU, AWS Trainium); hyperscaler capex digestion post-2026.

RDDT.analyst: Buy consensus; PTs $150-220. Ad load and AI-training data licensing are the upside drivers.
RDDT.bull: Ad revenue compounding 40-50% as platform matures; Google/Anthropic data licensing adds high-margin revenue; international expansion untapped.
RDDT.bear: High-beta ad revenue sensitive to macro; AI-generated answer engines reduce referral traffic; valuation rich on 2026 forward EBITDA.

SE.analyst: Buy consensus; PTs $150-200. Shopee take-rate expansion and Garena stability are the focus.
SE.bull: Shopee take-rate rising with ad monetization; SeaMoney credit cross-sell; Garena Free Fire stabilization lifts gaming EBITDA.
SE.bear: Tiktok Shop competition in Indonesia/Vietnam intensifies; credit book NPL cycle; Garena overly reliant on Free Fire.

SNOW.analyst: Buy consensus; PTs $200-260. Cortex AI and consumption reacceleration are catalysts.
SNOW.bull: Cortex AI functions drive incremental consumption; Snowpark adoption in data engineering; Iceberg interop expands workloads beyond Snowflake-native.
SNOW.bear: Databricks + open Iceberg / DuckDB compress pricing; consumption model leaves revenue exposed to customer cost optimization.

TEAM.analyst: Buy consensus; PTs $260-320. Cloud migration tail and Enterprise edition attach drive the story.
TEAM.bull: Server-to-Cloud migrations continue; Rovo AI agents add upsell; Enterprise edition share lifts ARPU; Jira Service Management takes ITSM share.
TEAM.bear: Paid seat growth slowing; Rovo AI ROI unclear vs. Copilot/Gemini; developer-tool AI automation reduces seat expansion.

TSM.analyst: Buy consensus; PTs $230-280. Leading-edge node pricing power and AI wafer share drive upside.
TSM.bull: 3nm/2nm pricing rises; AI accelerator wafer demand from Nvidia/Broadcom/AMD locks capacity through 2027; Arizona fabs de-risk geopolitical tail.
TSM.bear: Taiwan Strait geopolitical risk; mature-node pricing softness on China overcapacity; capex intensity compresses near-term FCF.
